texto: You know that feeling you get when you pass by a cop doing like 20 over, when your stomach hits the floor and you get weak in the knees and it seams like time just stops for a min? Thats how i feel every time i see her. I love it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Andrew Vyvyan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “You know that feeling you get when you pass by a cop doing like 20 over, when your stomach hits t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, love, relationship pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de love e relationship.
